summary.verdict_desc: 本周计数与上周持平（5 红 / 7 黄 / 11 绿），红灯比例 21.7% 仍位于观察区间，但分类强制升级再次生效——估值 2/3 红（CAPE 41.66、Top-5 ≈27.8%）叠加资金面 3/4 红（Mag4 FCF 仍深度负、VC AI 占比 66%、NVDA 客户投资/收入 67%）。本周三大新增信号：Cerebras 周三 IPO 定价 $185、首日 +68% 收 $311，市值由发行的 $26.6B 跃至 $95B（公开浮动股市值 $39.8B）；S&P 50 日均线上方比例由 51% 跌至 45.5%，市场广度持续走弱；Warsh 5/15 接棒主席，6/16-17 FOMC 由其主持，并主张废除点阵图。
summary.verdict_desc_en: Counts unchanged week-over-week (5 red / 7 yellow / 11 green); aggregate red ratio 21.7% sits in the Observation band, but the category-override rule triggers once more — valuation 2/3 RED (CAPE 41.66, Top-5 ≈27.8%) plus capital 3/4 RED (Mag4 FCF still deeply negative, VC AI share 66%, NVDA customer-investment-to-revenue 67%). Three notable developments this week: Cerebras priced its IPO at $185 on Wednesday and closed +68% at $311 — market cap leapt from the $26.6B target to roughly $95B (public float worth $39.8B); the S&P-500 % above 50-day MA slid from 51% to 45.5%, with breadth deteriorating; Warsh took the chair on May 15 and will run the June 16-17 FOMC while pushing to scrap the dot plot.

wow_changes.note: Cerebras 5/13 定价 $185、上市首日 +68% 收 $311，市值跃至约 $95B（公开浮动 $39.8B），远超原 $26.6B 目标——管道首单的需求被验证，SpaceX/OpenAI/Anthropic 后续路演热度抬升
wow_changes.note_en: Cerebras priced at $185 on May 13 and closed +68% at $311 on debut, taking market cap to roughly $95B (public float $39.8B), well above the original $26.6B target — pipeline demand validated, hyping anticipation for SpaceX, OpenAI and Anthropic roadshows

wow_changes.note: S5FI 一周由 51.19 跌至 45.5（区间 45.12-48.90）、技术信号转为强卖出；仍处黄区但贴近 40% 红线，市场广度边际走弱
wow_changes.note_en: S5FI fell from 51.19 to 45.5 over the week (range 45.12-48.90); the daily signal flipped to Strong Sell — still in yellow but pressed against the 40% red line, breadth deteriorating at the margin

wow_changes.note: Crunchbase 4 月数据：全球 VC $56B 中 AI 占 66%（$37B），较 Q1 累计 80% 回落，但 Anthropic $15B + Bezos Project Prometheus $10B 合计占 4 月 45%；仍远高于 50% 红线
wow_changes.note_en: Crunchbase April print: AI captured 66% ($37B) of global $56B VC, down from the 80% Q1 cumulative — yet Anthropic $15B and Bezos's Project Prometheus $10B together absorbed 45% of April; still well above the 50% red line

wow_changes.note: RSP 2026 年至今领先 SPY 近 5pp，6 月差由 -1.5% 重新走阔至约 -4%——等权重再度跑赢，头部独涨阶段未启动
wow_changes.note_en: RSP leads SPY by nearly 5 percentage points YTD; the 6-month spread re-widened from -1.5% to about -4% — equal-weight back in front, top-heavy regime has not yet restarted

wow_changes.note: Powell 5/15 卸任主席（继续留任理事），Warsh 接棒并将主持 6/16-17 首次会议；公开主张废除点阵图与前瞻指引，4 月会议 4 名异议表明降息门槛仍高
wow_changes.note_en: Powell stepped down as Chair on May 15 (stays on as Governor); Warsh now chairs and will run his first meeting June 16-17 — he wants to abandon the dot plot and forward guidance, and the four April dissents flag a still-high bar for cuts

indicators.note: Multpl 41.66（日内 -0.52）、GuruFocus 月度 40.93、YCharts 39.58；155 年来第 2 高，距 2000 峰值 44.19 仅 6%，长期年化预期回报压至 ~1.3%
indicators.note_en: Multpl 41.66 (down 0.52 intraday), GuruFocus monthly 40.93, YCharts 39.58; 2nd highest in 155 years, just 6% below the 2000 peak of 44.19, implied 10-year forward return compressed to ~1.3%

indicators.note: SPY 权重 5/12 读数 AAPL 7.12 / MSFT 6.58 / NVDA 6.24 / GOOGL ≈5.7 / AMZN ≈5.0 → Top-5 ≈27.8%；Top-10 35.59%、Mag7 30.44%；NVDA 自高位回落但 AAPL 反超，集中度仍贴 2000 年极值
indicators.note_en: SPY weights as of May 12 — AAPL 7.12 / MSFT 6.58 / NVDA 6.24 / GOOGL ~5.7 / AMZN ~5.0 → Top-5 ≈27.8%; Top-10 35.59%, Mag7 30.44%; NVDA has slipped from its high while AAPL retook the lead, but concentration remains pinned near the 2000 peak

indicators.note: GuruFocus 27.16、StockAnalysis 25.1、Finbox 24.5、Public 28.1，分布 24-28x；NVDA 估值倍数在 Mag7 中仍是最低，FY27 EPS 预期 $8.34 对应 fwd P/E 仅 23-24
indicators.note_en: GuruFocus 27.16, StockAnalysis 25.1, Finbox 24.5, Public 28.1 — range 24-28x; NVDA still trades at the lowest multiple in Mag7, FY27 EPS estimate of $8.34 implies fwd P/E of just 23-24

indicators.threshold_text: 指引下调=红 / 加速=黄 / 稳健=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Guidance cut = red / accelerating = yellow / steady = green
indicators.note: Q1 财报后 4 家合计指引 $725B（MSFT $190B、AMZN $200B、GOOGL $175-185B、META $125-145B），YoY +77%；约 75% 用于 AI 基础设施；指引仍在加速无下调
indicators.note_en: Post-Q1 the four hyperscalers guide combined $725B (MSFT $190B, AMZN $200B, GOOGL $175-185B, META $125-145B), YoY +77%; ~75% earmarked for AI infrastructure; guidance still accelerating with no cuts

indicators.note: Morgan Stanley/Bank of America 测算 Amazon 2026 全年 FCF -$17B 至 -$28B；Microsoft FCF 同比 -28%；GOOGL capex 175-185B 几乎吃光 OCF；Asymco 测算 GOOGL 2027 FCF 触零；Mag7 整体环比 -10%、同比 -13%
indicators.note_en: Morgan Stanley/BofA model Amazon 2026 FCF at -$17B to -$28B; Microsoft FCF -28% YoY; GOOGL capex of $175-185B will swallow nearly all OCF; Asymco projects GOOGL 2027 FCF to hit zero; Mag7 aggregate -10% QoQ, -13% YoY

indicators.name_zh: AI 占 VC 投资比重
indicators.note: Crunchbase 4 月：全球 VC $56B 中 AI $37B 占 66%（AI 模型 $26.7B + 物理 AI $5.3B + 基础设施 $1.8B）；Anthropic $15B + Bezos Project Prometheus $10B 合计 45%；较 Q1 累计 80% 回落但仍远超红线
indicators.note_en: Crunchbase April: of global $56B VC, AI took $37B = 66% (AI models $26.7B + physical AI $5.3B + infrastructure $1.8B); Anthropic $15B and Bezos's Project Prometheus $10B accounted for 45% combined; well off the Q1 cumulative 80% but still far above the red threshold

indicators.note: NVDA 2026 年至今股权投资 >$40B（OpenAI $30B + Anthropic $10B + CoreWeave 增至 $3.66B/11% + Nebius $2B + Marvell/Lumentum/Coherent 各 $2B）；公司表态暂停新 AI 初创投注；circular financing 担忧未消
indicators.note_en: NVDA's 2026 YTD equity bets exceed $40B (OpenAI $30B + Anthropic $10B + CoreWeave bumped to $3.66B / 11% stake + Nebius $2B + Marvell/Lumentum/Coherent $2B each); the company says it's pausing new AI startup bets, but circular-financing concerns persist

indicators.note: S5FI 由上周 51.19 跌至 45.52，区间 45.12-48.90，技术信号转为强卖出；仍处黄区但贴近 40% 红线，市场广度走弱明显
indicators.note_en: S5FI fell from 51.19 last week to 45.52, range 45.12-48.90; daily technical signal turned Strong Sell — still yellow but hugging the 40% red line, breadth weakening visibly

indicators.name_zh: 市值加权 vs 等权重
indicators.note: RSP 2026 年至今领先 SPY 近 5pp，6 月差由 -1.5% 重新走阔至约 -4%；等权重持续跑赢说明涨幅仍向行业扩散，头部独涨阶段未启动
indicators.note_en: RSP leads SPY by nearly 5 percentage points YTD; the 6-month spread re-widened from -1.5% to about -4%; equal-weight's persistent lead shows gains still broadening across sectors, top-heavy regime not yet restarted

indicators.name_zh: AI 龙头内部人卖买比
indicators.note: NVDA、AVGO 内部人 30 日内仍以卖出为主（Huang/Kress/EVPs 通过 10b5-1 计划持续减持，AVGO 过去 3 个月零买入），OpenInsider 实时表受限沿用 ~8x；距 2000 极值 23x 仍远
indicators.note_en: NVDA and AVGO insiders remain net sellers in the trailing 30 days (Huang, Kress and other EVPs continue programmatic 10b5-1 sales, AVGO insider buying has been zero over the past 3 months); OpenInsider real-time tables are gated so we carry over the ~8x aggregate, still well short of the 2000 peak of 23x

indicators.threshold_text: 洪流=红 / 升温=黄 / 平静=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Flood = red / Warming = yellow / Quiet = green
indicators.note: Cerebras 5/13 定价 $185、上市首日 +68% 收 $311，市值由发行的 $26.6B 跃至约 $95B（公开浮动 $39.8B），上调募资规模至 $5.6B；OpenAI 承诺 $20B 拿 11% 战投；SpaceX 下周路演（$1.25T 合并估值）、OpenAI Q4 IPO（~$1T）、Anthropic 10 月（$900B）；组合 mega-IPO 需求 $100-200B 超 2025 全年美国 IPO
indicators.note_en: Cerebras priced at $185 on May 13 and closed +68% at $311 on debut, lifting market cap from the $26.6B target to ~$95B (public float $39.8B), with the raise upsized to $5.6B; OpenAI committed $20B for an 11% strategic stake; SpaceX roadshow next week ($1.25T merged valuation), OpenAI Q4 IPO (~$1T), Anthropic October (~$900B); combined mega-IPO demand of $100-200B exceeds the full 2025 US IPO market

indicators.note: ICE BofA HY OAS 维持 ~2.80%、12 月百分位 27，年初 ~4% 至今压缩 ~120bps；信用市场对 AI capex 与广度走弱仍未紧缩
indicators.note_en: ICE BofA HY OAS holds at ~2.80%, 12-month percentile 27, compressed ~120bps from ~4% at year-start; credit markets still not tightening in response to AI capex or breadth weakness

indicators.name_zh: 数据中心 ABS 利差
indicators.threshold_text: 走阔 50bps+ = 红 / 稳定 = 黄 / 收窄 = 绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Widening 50bps+ = red / Stable = yellow / Tightening = green
indicators.note: CloudHQ $1.4B AAA 4/20 以 I-curve +125bp 定价（yield 5.1%），Single-A 175bp/5.6%；较 Switch 3/18 AAA 185bp / Single-A 225bp 全面收紧 50-60bps；CoreWeave 4 月再发 $6.25B 债务，但 ABS 利差仍走紧
indicators.note_en: CloudHQ's $1.4B AAA priced at I-curve +125bp on Apr 20 (5.1% yield), Single-A at 175bp / 5.6%; tightened 50-60bps versus Switch's March 18 AAA at 185bp and Single-A at 225bp; CoreWeave issued another $6.25B in debt in April, yet ABS spreads continue to compress

indicators.note: CoreWeave / Nebius / Crusoe / Lambda 90 日内无下调或违约；CoreWeave Q1 收入 $2.1B（+112% YoY）、积压 $100B，但利息支出三倍至 $311M、$34B 表外租赁与新发 $6.25B 债是潜在风险
indicators.note_en: CoreWeave / Nebius / Crusoe / Lambda — no downgrades or defaults in 90 days; CoreWeave Q1 revenue $2.1B (+112% YoY), backlog $100B, yet interest expense tripled to $311M and $34B in off-balance-sheet leases plus a fresh $6.25B debt issue remain latent risks

indicators.name_zh: AI 行业 Token 月度环比
indicators.threshold_text: 收缩=红 / 减速=黄 / 加速=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Contraction = red / Decel = yellow / Accel = green
indicators.note: OpenRouter 5/4 当周：Anthropic 1.7T tokens（周环比 +24%）、OpenAI 521B（+20%）；平台总量 >20T tokens/周；中国模型占总流量 45%+，全产业 token 用量持续加速
indicators.note_en: OpenRouter week of May 4: Anthropic 1.7T tokens (+24% WoW), OpenAI 521B (+20%); platform total >20T tokens/week; Chinese models now command 45%+ of total traffic, industry-wide token usage still accelerating

indicators.name_zh: Token 增速 / 收入增速 比值
indicators.note: Anthropic ARR 30x YoY（$1B→$30B），token YoY ~10x，token / ARR ≈ 0.3-0.5；Claude Code 5 个月 $500M→$2.5B；收入仍快于 token 用量，单 token 价值上行
indicators.note_en: Anthropic ARR up 30x YoY ($1B → $30B) vs token volume ~10x — token-to-ARR growth ratio ≈ 0.3-0.5; Claude Code went $500M → $2.5B in 5 months; revenue still outpaces tokens, per-token value is rising

indicators.name_zh: AI 收入增速的二阶导
indicators.threshold_text: 减速=红 / 平稳=黄 / 加速=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Decel = red / Flat = yellow / Accel = green
indicators.note: Anthropic ARR 序列 Feb $14B → Mar $19B → Apr $30B（单月增量 $5B → $11B），正式超越 OpenAI $24B（$2B/月）；OpenAI CRO 内部备忘录质疑 $30B 数字高估约 $8B 但分歧未改 2 阶导方向
indicators.note_en: Anthropic ARR trajectory Feb $14B → Mar $19B → Apr $30B (monthly increment $5B → $11B), formally surpassing OpenAI's $24B ($2B/month run-rate); OpenAI's CRO memo disputes the $30B headline by ~$8B but the 2nd-derivative direction stays positive

indicators.note: Deloitte 2026：72% 企业至少 1 项 AI workload 生产化（2024 年 55%、2020 年 20%），80%+ Fortune 500 跑 AI agent；但仅 25% 完成 ≥40% pilot 转产，深度仍不足
indicators.note_en: Deloitte 2026: 72% of enterprises have at least one AI workload in production (vs 55% in 2024 and 20% in 2020), 80%+ of Fortune 500 run AI agents; yet only 25% have moved ≥40% of pilots to production — depth still lags

indicators.threshold_text: 负增长=红 / 减速=黄 / 加速=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Negative = red / Decel = yellow / Accel = green
indicators.note: MSFT 商业 RPO $392B（+51% YoY，剔 OpenAI 仍 +26%）、Azure +40% 受供应限制；GCP backlog 由 Q4 $240B 跃至 $460B（接近翻倍）；AWS 收入 +28% 为 15 季最快；三大 hyperscaler 积压合计 $1.1T
indicators.note_en: MSFT commercial RPO $392B (+51% YoY, +26% ex-OpenAI), Azure +40% supply-constrained; GCP backlog roughly doubled from Q4's $240B to $460B; AWS revenue +28%, fastest in 15 quarters; combined hyperscaler backlog ~$1.1T

indicators.threshold_text: 任何=红 / 调查=黄 / 无=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Any confirmed = red / Investigation = yellow / None = green
indicators.note: Burry 持续指控 Mag7 通过延长 AI 服务器折旧（实际 2-3 年寿命却按 5-6 年）2026-28 虚增收益 $176B（ORCL +62%、AMZN +31%、META +30%、MSFT +16%）；NVDA 公开回应称未收到 SEC 调查；仍无正式执法
indicators.note_en: Burry continues to allege Mag7 inflates 2026-28 earnings by ~$176B by extending AI-server depreciation from a realistic 2-3 years to 5-6 years (ORCL +62%, AMZN +31%, META +30%, MSFT +16%); NVDA publicly denied any SEC probe; no formal enforcement yet

indicators.threshold_text: 加息=红 / 通胀压力=黄 / 降息=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Hike = red / Inflation pressure = yellow / Cut = green
indicators.note: Warsh 5/15 接棒主席（Powell 留任理事至 2028），首场 FOMC 6/16-17；Warsh 公开主张废除点阵图与前瞻指引；3 月点阵图仍隐含全年 1 次降息，4 月 4 名异议表明降息门槛仍高
indicators.note_en: Warsh succeeded Powell as Chair on May 15 (Powell remains Governor through 2028); his first FOMC is June 16-17; Warsh publicly advocates scrapping the dot plot and forward guidance; the March dots still imply just one cut in 2026 and April's four dissents reaffirm a high bar for cuts

indicators.name_zh: 资本开支指引市场反应
indicators.threshold_text: 系统性惩罚=红 / 偶发=黄 / 奖励=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Systematic punishment = red / Episodic = yellow / Rewarded = green
indicators.note: Q1 后市场分化延续：META -6%（capex 升至 $125-145B，蒸发 $175B 市值），MSFT、AMZN 同步下跌；唯独 GOOGL 上涨（GCP +63% 兑现 capex）；2 罚 + 1 奖未达系统性
indicators.note_en: Post-Q1 split persists: META -6% (capex raised to $125-145B, erased $175B in market cap), MSFT and AMZN also slipped; only GOOGL rallied (GCP +63% validated capex); 2 punished + 1 rewarded — not yet systemic

indicators.threshold_text: 普遍承认过热=红 / 部分=黄 / 无=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Widespread acknowledgment = red / Partial = yellow / None = green
indicators.note: Altman："投资者整体对 AI 过度兴奋"；Dimon："远比别人担心"、"多数人将损失"；Pichai："无公司能免疫泡沫"；Nadella 警告 AI 需更广社会影响否则失"社会许可"；对冲增加但未达普遍承认
indicators.note_en: Altman: 'investors as a whole are overexcited about AI'; Dimon: 'far more worried than others', 'most people involved will not do well'; Pichai: 'no company is immune to a bubble bursting'; Nadella warns AI needs broader social impact or it risks losing 'social permission'; hedging is rising but short of universal acknowledgment
